headline: Amcor Boosts Footprint in China With Packaging Facility Expansion
summary: AMCR expands its Dongguan packaging facility with new manufacturing and warehouse space to raise capacity and support recyclable packaging production in China.

headline: Flexible Packaging Market Research Report 2026-2031 | Key Trends Include Lightweight Designs and Shelf-Life Longevity, Though Raw Material Volatility Poses Challenges
summary: Global Flexible Packaging Market Global Flexible Packaging Market Dublin, July 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "Global Flexible Packaging Market Research Report 2026-2031" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering.The global flexible packaging market is set to grow at a CAGR of approximately 4.80% from 2025 to 2031. The bags and sacks segment currently leads, capturing 43% market share. The use of flexible paper is projected to grow at a CAGR of 4.73% during the forecast period. Indus
